name: useTheme
description: Manages UI preferences including Mode (light/dark), layout structure, CSS direction (RTL/LTR), sideNav state, and Theme schemas.
usage_guidelines: Accepts a selector to optimize re-renders.
Is a wrapper around ThemeContext and syncs changes to `document.documentElement`.

params.name: selector
params.description: Selector function for extracting a slice from the theme state.

return_value.description: The requested slice from the `useTheme` return type, heavily typed.

Do: Pass partial selectors like `useTheme((state) => state.mode)` to prevent unnecessary renders.
Use `setMode` to seamlessly switch light/dark root element classes.
Dont: Do not extract the entire theme context heavily without a selector.
